seasonTagline: You radiate warmth and depth with rich, earthy colors that enhance your natural intensity.
skinDescription: Your skin has a medium-deep depth with warm, golden undertones that look beautifully sun-kissed.
hairDescription: Your hair is a very dark, rich brown with subtle warm undertones, almost black.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a deep, warm brown, adding to the overall richness of your coloring.
seasonStory: Your natural coloring is characterized by depth and warmth, making rich, saturated colors your best allies. The deep tones in your skin, hair, and eyes allow you to carry intense hues beautifully, creating a striking and harmonious look.

bestColors.name: Deep Olive Green
bestColors.reason: Complements your warm undertones and deep coloring.

bestColors.name: Warm Burgundy
bestColors.reason: Rich and deep, it harmonizes with your skin and eye depth.

bestColors.name: Terracotta
bestColors.reason: An earthy, warm tone that highlights your skin's golden quality.

bestColors.name: Mustard Yellow
bestColors.reason: A deep, warm yellow that contrasts beautifully with your dark features.

bestColors.name: Espresso Brown
bestColors.reason: A deep, rich neutral that echoes your natural hair color.

bestColors.name: Forest Green
bestColors.reason: A deep, earthy green that looks natural and vibrant on you.

bestColors.name: Deep Teal
bestColors.reason: A rich, saturated jewel tone that complements your depth.

bestColors.name: Warm Plum
bestColors.reason: A deep, warm version of purple that enhances your eyes.

bestColors.name: Caramel
bestColors.reason: A warm, inviting neutral that brightens your complexion.

bestColors.name: Deep Rust
bestColors.reason: An intense, earthy color that matches your natural warmth.

bestColors.name: Golden Ochre
bestColors.reason: A warm, earthy yellow that brings out the golden tones in your skin.

bestColors.name: Warm Cream
bestColors.reason: A soft, warm neutral that is lighter than pure white but still harmonizes.

avoidColors.name: Pastel Pink
avoidColors.reason: Too light and cool; washes out your deep, warm coloring.

avoidColors.name: Bright Electric Blue
avoidColors.reason: Too cool and saturated; clashes with your warm undertones.

avoidColors.name: Pure White
avoidColors.reason: Too stark and cool; creates a harsh contrast against your natural depth.

foundation.tip: Look for foundations with warm, golden, or olive undertones that match your medium-deep skin.

celebrities.name: Priyanka Chopra
celebrities.reason: Shares a similar deep autumn coloring with rich skin, dark hair, and warm brown eyes.

celebrities.name: Freida Pinto
celebrities.reason: Embodies the warmth and depth of Deep Autumn with her gorgeous complexion and dark features.

celebrities.name: Aishwarya Rai
celebrities.reason: Her deep, warm coloring and striking features align perfectly with the Deep Autumn palette.

celebrities.name: Shakira
celebrities.reason: While her hair can vary, her natural deep, warm skin tone and eye color are classic Deep Autumn.
